entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A traditional grain legume crop and important dietary component in Nepal.

entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: The country where chickpea is grown and IPM is being implemented.

entities.name: BOTRYTIS GRAY MOLD
entities.description: A disease that has caused a decreasing trend in chickpea cultivation area.

entities.name: POD BORER
entities.description: An insect pest that has caused a decreasing trend in chickpea cultivation area.

entities.name: ABIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Non-living factors causing low and unstable yields of chickpea at the national level.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of chickpea, noted as low and unstable.

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: An on-farm approach for managing pests and diseases in chickpea.

entities.name: AGRONOMICAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Improved farming techniques integrated with IPM for sustainable production.

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The long-term viability of the cropping system and chickpea production.
